storylets.title: {=floor_prisoner_report_captive_noble_title}A noble for coin
storylets.setup: {=floor_prisoner_report_captive_noble_setup}A captured noble is traded for coin. A lord somewhere is pleased. The wagoner leads the man out on a short rope, and no one on the column meets his eye.

storylets.title: {=floor_prisoner_report_escape_attempt_title}Tried to walk out
storylets.setup: {=floor_prisoner_report_escape_attempt_setup}Someone tried to walk out of the cell-wagon. He's back in it, quieter. The guards do not say what was done to him, and no one on the column asks.

storylets.title: {=floor_prisoner_report_interrogation_title}He said enough
storylets.setup: {=floor_prisoner_report_interrogation_setup}The captive has been questioned. He said enough. What that means exactly no one on the column will explain, and the officers come back looking tired rather than pleased.

storylets.title: {=floor_prisoner_report_ransom_paid_title}A ransom paid
storylets.setup: {=floor_prisoner_report_ransom_paid_setup}A ransom paid. Two saddles lighter, one life heavier. The coin goes into a chest, the man goes onto a horse, and the column goes on as before.
